title: Hang in Concat Optimization
body:
Tested with v4.222 on RHEL8 and MacOS 12.3.

We have been experiencing a "hang" during verilation. The test cases attached at the bottom exhibit this behavior. I think I have narrowed the issue down to this concat optimization: https://github.com/verilator/verilator/blob/30783e6a79f0e5ec13ab7dd7a13e03d13aab83ad/src/V3Const.cpp#L1423

At the log level set by --debug, the following logs are produced, before Verilator "hangs":

```
Starting Verilator 4.222 2022-05-02 rev v4.222
- Verilator.cpp:564:  Option --verilate: Start Verilation
- V3File.cpp:218:        --check-times failed: no input obj_dir/VSiFive_CSRFile__verFiles.dat
- V3ParseImp.cpp:274: parseFile: SiFive_CSRFile
  Preprocessing SiFive_CSRFile.sv
- V3PreShell.cpp:147:     Reading SiFive_CSRFile.sv
- V3ParseImp.cpp:323: Lexing SiFive_CSRFile.sv
dot -Tpdf -o ~/a.pdf obj_dir/VSiFive_CSRFile_001_linkcells.dot
- V3LinkLevel.cpp:45: modSortByLevel()
- V3Ast.cpp:1108:     Dumping obj_dir/VSiFive_CSRFile_002_cells.tree
- V3LinkDot.h:37:     linkDotPrimary:
- V3LinkJump.cpp:303: linkJump:
- V3Ast.cpp:1108:     Dumping obj_dir/VSiFive_CSRFile_007_linkjump.tree
- V3LinkInc.cpp:276:  linkIncrements:
- V3Ast.cpp:1108:     Dumping obj_dir/VSiFive_CSRFile_008_linkinc.tree
- V3Param.cpp:1254:   param:
- V3LinkDot.h:42:     linkDotParamed:
- V3Ast.cpp:1108:     Dumping obj_dir/VSiFive_CSRFile_010_linkdotparam.tree
- V3Dead.cpp:455:     deadifyModules:
- V3Width.cpp:6451:   width:
- V3Ast.cpp:1108:     Dumping obj_dir/VSiFive_CSRFile_012_width.tree
- V3Width.cpp:6494:   widthCommit:
- V3Const.cpp:3584:   constifyAllLive:
- V3Ast.cpp:1108:     Dumping obj_dir/VSiFive_CSRFile_014_const.tree
- V3Undriven.cpp:475: undrivenAll:
- V3AssertPre.cpp:206:assertPreAll:
- V3Ast.cpp:1108:     Dumping obj_dir/VSiFive_CSRFile_015_assertpre.tree
- V3Assert.cpp:475:   assertAll:
- V3Ast.cpp:1108:     Dumping obj_dir/VSiFive_CSRFile_016_assert.tree
- V3LinkLevel.cpp:143:wrapTop:
- V3Const.cpp:3557:   constifyAllLint: 
```

After I press press CTRL-C, the following backtrace is produced:

```

#43 0x0000000000508d66 in ConstVisitor::visit(AstConcat*) ()
#44 0x000000000041bce4 in AstConcat::accept(VNVisitor&) ()
#45 0x00000000004328d3 in AstNode::iterateAndNext(VNVisitor&) ()
#46 0x0000000000432988 in AstNode::iterateChildren(VNVisitor&) ()

#62 0x0000000000432988 in AstNode::iterateChildren(VNVisitor&) ()
#63 0x0000000000504edf in ConstVisitor::visit(AstOr*) ()
#64 0x0000000000425030 in AstOr::accept(VNVisitor&) ()
#65 0x00000000004328d3 in AstNode::iterateAndNext(VNVisitor&) ()
#66 0x0000000000432977 in AstNode::iterateChildren(VNVisitor&) ()

#72 0x000000000040d475 in VNVisitor::visit(AstModule*) ()
#73 0x000000000044799a in AstModule::accept(VNVisitor&) ()
#74 0x000000000042ab77 in AstNode::iterateListBackwards(VNVisitor&) ()
#75 0x000000000042aba2 in AstNode::iterateChildrenBackwards(VNVisitor&) ()
#76 0x00000000004bf2be in ConstVisitor::visit(AstNetlist*) ()
#77 0x0000000000448506 in AstNetlist::accept(VNVisitor&) ()
#78 0x0000000000432a17 in AstNode::iterateSubtreeReturnEdits(VNVisitor&) ()
#79 0x00000000004bdf20 in V3Const::constifyAllLint(AstNetlist*) ()
#80 0x0000000000406be4 in process() ()
#81 0x0000000000407ce2 in verilate(std::__cxx11::basic_string<char, std::char_traits<char>, std::allocator<char> > const&) ()
#82 0x0000000000409e24 in main ()
```

I've tried a few times, and found similar backtraces. They always have `ConstVisitor::visit(AstConcat*)`, followed by some frames of `ConstVisitor::concatMergeable(AstNode const*, AstNode const*)`, followed by `ConstVisitor::ifMergeAdjacent(AstNode*, AstNode*)`. The top of the stack after that appears to vary, but this is the code path Verilator is consistently in.

It feels like this is tickling some degenerate case that goes badly quadratic or exponential, or some graph traversal isn't protecting against cycles. This is just a wild guess, and I am learning about this part of Verilator's internals to see if I can be more helpful.


[t_concat_or.v.txt](https://github.com/verilator/verilator/files/8628542/t_concat_or.v.txt)
[t_concat_or.pl.txt](https://github.com/verilator/verilator/files/8628543/t_concat_or.pl.txt)
